mapper.select: SELECT ac.id AS application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ac.posting_date, ac.status, ac.is_favorite, ac.created_at, ac.updated_at, fa.fit_score, fa.missing_skills, fa.created_at AS analyzed_at, ja.required_skills, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_session interview_count_source WHERE interview_count_source.application_case_id = ac.id AND interview_count_source.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS interview_count, ( SELECT latest_interview.total_score FROM interview_session latest_interview WHERE latest_interview.application_case_id = ac.id AND latest_interview.deleted_at IS NULL AND latest_interview.total_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY latest_interview.created_at DESC, latest_interview.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_interview_score FROM application_case ac LEFT JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.application_case_id = ac.id AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_fa.id) FROM fit_analysis latest_fa WHERE latest_fa.application_case_id = ac.id ) LEFT JOIN job_analysis ja ON ja.application_case_id = ac.id AND ja.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_ja.id) FROM job_analysis latest_ja WHERE latest_ja.application_case_id = ac.id ) WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY ac.is_favorite DESC, COALESCE(fa.created_at, ac.updated_at) DESC, ac.id DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'FIT_ANALYSIS' AS type, ac.id AS application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, CONCAT(ac.company_name, ' ', ac.job_title, ' 적합도 분석 완료 · ', fa.fit_score, '점') AS content, fa.created_at AS occurred_at, fa.fit_score AS score FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'INTERVIEW' AS type, ac.id AS application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, CONCAT( ac.company_name, ' ', ac.job_title, ' 모의면접 ', IF(interview.total_score IS NULL, '진행', CONCAT('완료 · ', interview.total_score, '점')) ) AS content, COALESCE(interview.ended_at, interview.started_at, interview.created_at) AS occurred_at, interview.total_score AS score FROM interview_session interview INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = interview.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND interview.deleted_at IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'APPLICATION' AS type, ac.id AS application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, CONCAT(ac.company_name, ' ', ac.job_title, ' 지원 건 업데이트') AS content, ac.updated_at AS occurred_at, NULL AS score FROM application_case ac WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL ) activities ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 6

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_session interview INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = interview.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND interview.deleted_at IS NULL AND interview.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURRENT_DATE) DAY)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(credit_used), 0) FROM ai_usage_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE, '%Y-%m-01')

SELECT interview.id AS session_id, ac.id AS application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, interview.mode, interview.total_score, COALESCE(interview.ended_at, interview.started_at, interview.created_at) AS occurred_at FROM interview_session interview INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = interview.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND interview.deleted_at IS NULL AND interview.total_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY occurred_at DESC, interview.id DESC LIMIT 2

SELECT ia.feedback FROM interview_answer ia INNER JOIN interview_question iq ON iq.id = ia.question_id WHERE iq.interview_session_id = #{sessionId} AND ia.submission_status = 'COMPLETED' AND ia.feedback IS NOT NULL AND ia.feedback != '' ORDER BY COALESCE(ia.score, 0) ASC, ia.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, type, title, message, link, is_read, created_at FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT fa.application_case_id, fa.fit_score, fa.created_at FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.fit_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fa.application_case_id, fa.id

SELECT (SELECT ROUND(AVG(fa.fit_score)) FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(current_latest.id) FROM fit_analysis current_latest WHERE current_latest.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id AND current_latest.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) )) AS current_fit_average, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(fa.fit_score)) FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND fa.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(previous_latest.id) FROM fit_analysis previous_latest WHERE previous_latest.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id AND previous_latest.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND previous_latest.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) )) AS previous_fit_average, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(JSON_LENGTH(fa.missing_skills)), 0) FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(current_latest.id) FROM fit_analysis current_latest WHERE current_latest.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id AND current_latest.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) )) AS current_gap_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(JSON_LENGTH(fa.missing_skills)), 0) FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND fa.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(previous_latest.id) FROM fit_analysis previous_latest WHERE previous_latest.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id AND previous_latest.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND previous_latest.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) )) AS previous_gap_count, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(session.total_score)) FROM interview_session session INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = session.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND session.total_score IS NOT NULL AND session.deleted_at IS NULL AND session.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AS current_interview_average, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(session.total_score)) FROM interview_session session INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = session.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND session.total_score IS NOT NULL AND session.deleted_at IS NULL AND session.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND session.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AS previous_interview_average

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_tasks, COALESCE(SUM(task.completed), 0) AS completed_tasks FROM fit_analysis_learning_task task INNER JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.id = task.fit_analysis_id INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_fa.id) FROM fit_analysis latest_fa WHERE latest_fa.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id )
SELECT id, user_id, derived_key, task, time_label, done, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM dashboard_todo WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_todo (user_id, derived_key, task, time_label, done, completed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{derivedKey}, #{task}, #{timeLabel}, #{done}, CASE WHEN #{done} THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END)

INSERT INTO dashboard_todo (user_id, derived_key, task, time_label, done, completed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{derivedKey}, #{task}, #{timeLabel}, #{done}, CASE WHEN #{done} THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE task = VALUES(task), time_label = VALUES(time_label), done = VALUES(done), completed_at = VALUES(completed_at)
